evals.prompt: I need trusted domains for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the trusted-domains-extractor skill for this trusted domains extractor request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects trusted-domains-extractor for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_get_trusted_domains, cert_check_wildcard.
Keeps the response focused on extracting all domain names trusted by a certificate for cyberspace mapping, including wildcard expansions and base domain identification.

evals.prompt: Extract trusted DNS names and IPs from the certificate served by example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the trusted-domains-extractor skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects trusted-domains-extractor instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
